title: sparganium americanum var. androcladum
intro: Sparganium americanum var. androcladum, also known as American bur-reed, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Sparganiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. American bur-reed can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
